overall_assessment: P1 inventory for this scope is HIGH-QUALITY and largely accurate. Every load-bearing number I independently recomputed/traced reproduced against the cited JSON; every cited artifact exists; the 9 lineages (LIN-01/02/03/04/05/07/08/09/10) are correctly assigned; the master/matrix reports scope the LB-analogue positives correctly ('on the analogue only', 'BONUS'). No MATERIAL_ERROR and no numerical mismatch found in the 46 rows. Findings are limited to (a) semantics/labeling caveats P1 mostly already scoped, (b) an intra-family double-count of the single A- positive across 4 method rows, (c) one near-duplicate LB-substitution row, (d) one artifact-internal p-value ambiguity carried faithfully from the campaign's own final report, and (e) STALE source STATUS.md/DECISION_LOG that P1 correctly did NOT propagate.

omitted_methods_assessment.material_omissions: NONE. All 187 files the branch changed vs Foundry parent 09f7ef9 live under experiments/linear_a_relative_phonology/ (git diff --stat verified), so P1's dir-ownership missed no branch content. No newer/owning branch supersedes this scope.
non_material_collapses: G3_seedq folds 3 scripts (g3_anchor_nulls.py + g3_compound_systems.py + g3_seed_quality.py) into one row — reasonable (all WP-G3 anchor-null sub-analyses); artifact paths all cited.
I1_agnostic folds i1_agnostic.py + i1_robustness.py + I1_agnostic_free_objective_collapse.json into one row — reasonable.

Several WP-F report write-ups (F_CYPRO_MINOAN_SENSITIVITY.md, F_RELATIVE_CLASS_COMPATIBILITY.md, F_LINEAR_A_LINEAR_B_SUBSETS.md) are sub-analyses subsumed under F1_decompose/F2_calib rather than separate rows — defensible; no distinct load-bearing number lost.

duplicates_and_false_novelty: A- prefixation single positive is represented across FOUR rows: E1_morphology (induction), E5_wrongstruct (wrong-structure control), K1_nulls (adaptive null), SEAL_2 (held-out). Legitimate as distinct METHOD instances, but a synthesis-level tally of 'supported methods' must treat A- as ONE underlying claim, not four independent positives.

C3_lb_calib and C_AUDIT are NEAR-DUPLICATES: both establish the Linear B substitution consonant axis; C_AUDIT is the rigorous full-battery re-implementation that supersedes C3's initial calibration. Both are LB-analogue positives, not Linear A results.
No renamed-identical runs, no parameter-tweak-as-new-method, no proposals miscounted as executed methods were found.
positive_controls_and_analogue_positives: A1_reconstruct (LB reproduction), B3_known_script (LB boundary control), C3_lb_calib (LB substitution calibration), C_AUDIT (opaque-LB substitution VALIDATION), F2_calib (LB known-script calibration), plus LB positive controls embedded in D2/I1. These are LB-analogue / positive-control methods, NOT Linear A decipherment methods. P1 scopes each correctly ('(L2, LB)', 'on the analogue only', 'BONUS', 'known-script'), and the master report labels the whole substitution result 'RELATIVE_PHONOLOGY_ONLY, on the analogue only'. No overclaim found; flagged so downstream counts never read an analogue positive as Linear-A support.
numerical_caveats: K1_nulls libation rigid-order p: P1 (following M_FINAL_VERDICT sec 19) reports 'p 0.030'. The K1_nulls.json field literally named C_libation_random_anchor.adaptive_p_random_anchor = 0.00202 (0 random systems as-extreme-as-obs -> (0+1)/(493+1)). The 0.030 figure is random_systems_perfect_AND_ge_obs_pairs = 14/493 = 0.0284 (the '2.8% reached the 10 co-occurring consistent pairs' statistic). Both live in the artifact; P1's choice of the conservative 0.030 is consistent with the campaign's own final report. Classification: ARTIFACT_VERIFIED with a source-internal label ambiguity — NOT a P1 fabrication or mismatch.
All other load-bearing numbers traced to JSON: REPRODUCED or ARTIFACT_VERIFIED. No MISMATCH, no MISSING artifact.
verdict_semantics_flags: NO_POWER stated as refutation: NOT present — B4_synthetic (NO_POWER), D4_frontier (NO_POWER), F2_calib (NO_POWER) are all correctly worded as insufficient power, not as refuting the underlying method.

Analogue-positive stated as LA support: risk exists (C_AUDIT / C3_lb_calib / B3 SUPPORTED) but P1 CORRECTLY scopes every one to the readable-script analogue; not an error, flagged for downstream readers.
A1_reconstruct 'SUPPORTED' is a REPRODUCTION of a claim that is REFUTED downstream (A2-A6); scoped and supersession-linked by P1, but the bare SUPPORTED tag is semantically loose.
K1_nulls 'SUPPORTED' tags a null-calibration meta-method (outcome NULLS_CONFIRM_NULLS); defensible but it verifies rather than discovers.

REJECT unscoped / objective-invariance as universal-impossibility: NOT present — M1/H3/I1 correctly frame relabeling-invariance as underdetermination-by-monolingual-evidence (>=10^27 twins), explicitly NOT a proof of impossibility (M_FINAL_VERDICT sec 24). Correct.
Relative-classes as absolute values: NOT present — D5/C4/C5 consistently label the recovered partitions as anonymous/relative, licences NOT_EARNED.
Broad-family-null as refuting-all-models: NOT present — H1 null is scoped to the tested candidate families; Finnish + agnostic controls sit at the null (bar is specific, not leaky).
Dependent-sources as independent-replications: NOT present — G1 collapses 115 anchors to 6 lineages / 1 value channel (source-dependency graph applied).
stale_status_note: The SOURCE branch STATUS.md (dated 2026-07-07, 'Next automatic task: A1_reconstruct') and DECISION_LOG.md (entries stop at 'WP-A COMPLETE') are STALE/INCOMPLETE relative to the actually-completed campaign (M_FINAL_VERDICT.md + TASK_LEDGER + final commit 8a98607 = NEW_CONSTRAINTS_BUT_NO_DECIPHERMENT). This is a SOURCE-branch hygiene issue, NOT a P1 defect: P1's M1 row and master report correctly use the final verdict artifacts. Flagged because a naive re-audit via STATUS.md alone would misread the campaign as still at scaffold/WP-A.
constitution_compliance_observed: The campaign is exemplary on Art. XVII (append-only): E3 cross-site downgrade and D3/position->C/V corrections are recorded as ERRATUM/SUPERSEDING, never silent deletion; the Foundry record is preserved. Art. XII (no grading a target by the rule that created it) and non-circularity (LB values grade only, never model input) held throughout. SEAL_5 negative honestly recorded (no silent exclusion of a failed prediction).
bottom_line: For scope relative_phonology: 46/46 P1 rows VERIFIED against source artifacts; 0 material errors; 0 numerical mismatches; 0 missing artifacts; lineages correct; no material omissions. Adversarial findings reduce to labeling/semantics caveats (all of which P1 already scoped in strongest_authorized_claim / master report), one intra-family 4x double-count of the single A- positive, one near-duplicate LB row (C3 vs C_AUDIT), one source-internal p-value ambiguity carried faithfully from the campaign, and a stale source STATUS.md that P1 correctly ignored. P1 was NOT rubber-stamped: every one of the six requested numbers plus ~8 additional load-bearing figures was independently re-traced to its JSON.
